_comment: Rolepod Codex hooks. 3 core plugin hooks — byte-exact mirrors of root hooks/*.sh (parity enforced by tests/static/lean-surface.sh). Claude-only hooks (block-subagent-commit, cohesion-contract-check, session-lifecycle) are NOT registered here because Codex has no Agent / Stop event API and uses a different plugin model. Codex still needs `codex features enable plugin_hooks` before any hook here fires. verify-reminder was removed in PR 6 — verification is owned by the check-work skill + precommit-gate, not by a per-edit nag hook.
